arts.ttl: Ex-Liverpool star makes major Mohamed Salah contract claim he won't want to hear
arts.sum: Liverpool have decisions to make on Mohamed Salah, Virgil van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold, with all three players out of contract at the end of the current season

arts.ttl: Pep Lijnders reveals the truth about Jurgen Klopp's Liverpool exit, the 'bronzed' pictures his old boss sends him and his son's jibes about Salzburg switch
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE INTERVIEW BY LEWIS STEELE: Described by some as the brains of the Jurgen Klopp operation, the German's former right-hand man Pepijn Lijnders is a good talker.

arts.ttl: Liverpool reality might be more uncomfortable than they'd admit after £150m deals
arts.sum: Paul Gorst with a preview from Leipzig as Liverpool are entertained at the Red Bull Arena in the Champions League

arts.ttl: 'Not great news' - Calafiori injury adds to Arteta's woes ahead of Liverpool
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta says Riccardo Calafiori's suspected knee injury is "not great news" for Arsenal ahead of Sunday's crunch game against Liverpool in the Premier League - live on Sky Sports.

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed new injury concern as huge Bukayo Saka Liverpool update emerges
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news with Mikel Arteta issuing a huge double injury update before the Reds play Arsenal this weekend

arts.ttl: Liverpool predicted lineup vs RB Leipzig
arts.sum: Liverpool have made an impressive start to the 2024/25 season under Arne Slot and will be aiming to keep the good vibes alive when they visit RB Leipzig on Wednesday in the Champions League. Liverpool's Champions League record remains perfect so far with two victories at the beginning of the recently reformatted competition.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta drops Riccardo Calafiori and Bukayo Saka injury update after Arsenal win over Shakhtar
arts.sum: Arsenal ran out 1-0 winners over Shakhtar Donetsk in a fairly uninspiring Champions League encounter at the Emirates Stadium on Tuesday night. The Gunners weren’t...

arts.ttl: Report: Lukeba set to sign new Leipzig deal
arts.sum: Castello Lukeba is reportedly close to signing a new contract with RB Leipzig.

arts.ttl: Jota adds to Liverpool injury woes for Leipzig test
arts.sum: Liverpool's injury issues continue to mount with striker Diogo Jota added to an already lengthy list of absentees ahead of Wednesday's Champions League game at RB Leipzig

RB Leipzig defender Castello Lukeba has reportedly reached an agreement to sign a one-year contract extension at the club. Lukeba is wanted by Real Madrid, Manchester United and Liverpool, while Chelsea have also been linked with the 21-year-old in recent months as they continue scouting the best young talents in world football.
